ns0:entry.ns0:title: ARM-software/CMSIS_6
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ARM-software/CMSIS_6
Language: c
CMSIS version 6 (successor of CMSIS_5)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: FRRouting/frr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/FRRouting/frr
Language: c
The FRRouting Protocol Suite

ns0:entry.ns0:title: FreeRTOS/FreeRTOS-Kernel
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/FreeRTOS/FreeRTOS-Kernel
Language: c
FreeRTOS kernel files only, submoduled into https://github.com/FreeRTOS/FreeRTOS and various other repos.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Mbed-TLS/mbedtls
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Mbed-TLS/mbedtls
Language: c
An open source, portable, easy to use, readable and flexible TLS library, and reference implementation of the PSA Cryptography API. Releases are on a varying cadence, typically around 3 - 6 months between releases.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA/open-gpu-kernel-modules
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA/open-gpu-kernel-modules
Language: c
NVIDIA Linux open GPU kernel module source

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cilium/tetragon
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cilium/tetragon
Language: c
eBPF-based Security Observability and Runtime Enforcement

ns0:entry.ns0:title: curl/curl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/curl/curl
Language: c
A command line tool and library for transferring data with URL syntax, supporting DICT, FILE, FTP, FTPS, GOPHER, GOPHERS, HTTP, HTTPS, IMAP, IMAPS, LDAP, LDAPS, MQTT, MQTTS, POP3, POP3S, RTMP, RTMPS, RTSP, SCP, SFTP, SMB, SMBS, SMTP, SMTPS, TELNET, TFTP, WS and WSS. libcurl offers a myriad of powerful features

ns0:entry.ns0:title: espressif/esp-idf
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/espressif/esp-idf
Language: c
Espressif IoT Development Framework. Official development framework for Espressif SoCs.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: fastfetch-cli/fastfetch
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/fastfetch-cli/fastfetch
Language: c
A maintained, feature-rich and performance oriented, neofetch like system information tool.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: fluent/fluent-bit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/fluent/fluent-bit
Language: c
Fast and Lightweight Logs, Metrics and Traces processor for Linux, BSD, OSX and Windows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: git/git
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/git/git
Language: c
Git Source Code Mirror - This is a publish-only repository but pull requests can be turned into patches to the mailing list via GitGitGadget (https://gitgitgadget.github.io/). Please follow Documentation/SubmittingPatches procedure for any of your improvements.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: libevent/libevent
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/libevent/libevent
Language: c
Event notification library

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nanopb/nanopb
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nanopb/nanopb
Language: c
Protocol Buffers with small code size

ns0:entry.ns0:title: netdata/netdata
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/netdata/netdata
Language: c
The fastest path to AI-powered full stack observability, even for lean teams.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nxp-imx/linux-imx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nxp-imx/linux-imx
Language: c
i.MX Linux kernel

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openssh/openssh-portable
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openssh/openssh-portable
Language: c
Portable OpenSSH

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openucx/ucx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openucx/ucx
Language: c
Unified Communication X (mailing list - https://elist.ornl.gov/mailman/listinfo/ucx-group)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openwrt/openwrt
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openwrt/openwrt
Language: c
This repository is a mirror of https://git.openwrt.org/openwrt/openwrt.git It is for reference only and is not active for check-ins. We will continue to accept Pull Requests here. They will be merged via staging trees then into openwrt.git.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: valkey-io/valkey
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/valkey-io/valkey
Language: c
A flexible distributed key-value database that is optimized for caching and other realtime workloads.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: vedderb/bldc
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/vedderb/bldc
Language: c
The VESC motor control firmware

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zephyrproject-rtos/zephyr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zephyrproject-rtos/zephyr
Language: c
Primary Git Repository for the Zephyr Project. Zephyr is a new generation, scalable, optimized, secure RTOS for multiple hardware architectures.
